footer.disclaimer: Boston Soccer Passport is a local soccer guide concept. Official event details should be confirmed through official event organizers. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by FIFA, MLS, or the New England Revolution. Prototype built for the Hult International Business School consulting capstone (MGT-6080).

login.title: Sign in to keep your passport
login.subtitle: Save your points, schedule and rewards across devices.
login.guestHint: You can still explore everything — progress just stays on this device.
login.trust: We only store the name, email and avatar your provider returns. We never sell your data. Not affiliated with FIFA, MLS or the New England Revolution.
login.errorNoCred: Google did not return a credential. Please try again.
login.errorProfile: Could not fetch your Google profile. Please try again.
login.notConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured for this environment. Set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and reload.

checkIn.title: Sign in to save your check-in
checkIn.description: Sign in with Google to save your check-in at {{venue}} and keep your points across devices.

schedule.title: Sign in to save your soccer day
schedule.description: Without signing in, this event only lives in this browser. Sign in to keep your schedule across devices.

reward.title: Sign in to claim this reward
reward.description: Rewards like "{{title}}" are saved to your account. Sign in to claim it and keep it in your profile.

home.title: Your Boston Soccer Passport
home.subtitle: Discover where to watch, play, celebrate, and continue your soccer journey in New England.
home.welcomeBack: Welcome back, {{name}} · keep building your day.

signinBanner.title: Sign in to save your progress
signinBanner.body: Keep points, schedule and rewards across devices · +25 welcome bonus

revsSection.title: Continue the summer with the Revs
revsSection.tagline: The Revolution play through October. Take what you love about the summer of soccer and bring it home to Gillette — no hard sell.

quiz.archetypeTitle: What kind of soccer fan are you?
quiz.triviaBody: 10 questions · soccer culture + MLS basics · +30 points

map.disclaimer: Confirm official event details through the official organizers.

schedule.title: Build your soccer summer
schedule.subtitle: Plan check-ins, watch parties and matches. Each event added is +10 points.
schedule.empty: Your soccer day is empty. Add events from the Map.

rewards.title: Rewards Catalog
rewards.subtitle: Earn points by exploring Boston soccer. Claim perks when you reach a tier.

earnRules.schedule: +10 · Add an event to your schedule

rewards.noActivity: No activity yet. Start exploring to earn points.

share.title: Share My Soccer Passport
share.subtitle: Create a square card to post on Instagram or X. No FIFA marks, no official slogans.

templates.global: From Global Soccer to New England Soccer

share.headline: Headline

quiz.hubSubtitle: Discover your archetype and test your Boston soccer knowledge.

archetypeCard.title: What kind of soccer fan are you?

triviaCard.title: Boston & Revs trivia
triviaCard.body: 10 questions · soccer culture + MLS basics · +30 points

profile.title: Your soccer summer
profile.intro: Personalize your passport. Your information helps personalize your soccer experience. You control what you share.
profile.name: Name
profile.noArchetype: Take the quiz to get a personalized recommendation.
profile.noBadges: No rewards claimed yet. Earn points and claim from the Rewards tab.
profile.signInToSync: Sign in to keep your points, schedule and badges across devices. +25 welcome bonus.

admin.lockSignedOutBody: Sign in with an authorized Google account to continue.
admin.lockHint: Restricted to authorized Revolution staff and project leads.
admin.deniedBody: Your Google account {{email}} is not on the admin allowlist.
admin.askOwner: If you should have access, ask the project owner to add your email to the allowlist.
admin.title: Boston Soccer Passport — BI
admin.subtitle: Mock data — wire to Mixpanel · PostHog · Firebase Analytics. Refresh logic pending integration.
admin.qrTileBody: Generate per-venue printable A4 posters with UTM-tagged QR codes.

qrPosters.lockBody: Generate printable QR posters for every venue.
qrPosters.title: QR Poster Studio
qrPosters.subtitle: One printable A4 poster per venue. The QR encodes the app URL with a per-venue UTM so every scan is attributable in the funnel. Download PNG or PDF for print, or batch-download all.

toast.alreadyInDayBody: This is already on your soccer day.
toast.addNameWarn: Add a name to save your profile.
toast.reminderBody: You will see an in-app badge — push optional.
